option.name: originalContent
option.value:
namespace DZGame.Enums;
public enum MovingObjectType { Alien, AlienBullet, PlayerBullet, Player, Background, PixelShatter, Explosion }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
namespace DZGame.Enums;
public enum MovingObjectType { Alien, AlienBullet, PlayerBullet, Player, Background, PixelShatter, Explosion, PowerUp }

option.name: updatedContent
